recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your resident advisor tell you?
recent_60_samples.answer: She explained how the laundry cards work.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the lecturer mention about tomorrow's chemistry quiz?
recent_60_samples.answer: The lecturer asked if you'd reviewed the practice problems.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your friend say about joining the debate club?
recent_60_samples.answer: A friend told me when they're meeting this Thursday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the mailroom contact you about your parcel?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not picked it up yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the hiking club met last night.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do they post the meeting schedule?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish the reading for our seminar?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not started the second chapter yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you picked a topic for the term paper?
recent_60_samples.answer: I chose the one about renewable energy.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear about the midterm being rescheduled?
recent_60_samples.answer: The exam was moved to next Monday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find a good spot in the library?
recent_60_samples.answer: I grabbed a desk near the windows.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the librarian tell you about the booths?
recent_60_samples.answer: She said each booth holds six people.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your dorm advisor tell you about quiet hours?
recent_60_samples.answer: She explained why the quiet hours had been extended on weekdays.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Professor Cho ask you after class?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if my draft was ready.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what your roommate said about quiet hours.
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered whether residents must observe quiet hours nightly.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you finalized your spring courses yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not confirmed my elective choice.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you get into the seminar you wanted?
recent_60_samples.answer: I added the morning seminar this week.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just declared biology as my major.
recent_60_samples.answer: Which form do you sign for that?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you visit the registrar's office?
recent_60_samples.answer: My request to switch sections was denied.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm worried about overloading next semester.
recent_60_samples.answer: Can you drop a class after midterms?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you fix the leak in your room?
recent_60_samples.answer: The maintenance crew replaced the broken pipe.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Are you settling into the new dorm okay?
recent_60_samples.answer: My roommate keeps the kitchen very clean.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Tell me what the librarian told you about reserves.
recent_60_samples.answer: She mentioned that the textbook sat behind the front counter.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you finish your conversation with the housing office?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if my deposit had been returned.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you talked to Professor Reyes about your thesis?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether my outline included three case studies.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Is the heating working in your building yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: The radiator has not been repaired yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard the laundry room finally reopened.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where can I find the new dryers?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you talk to your roommate about the noise?
recent_60_samples.answer: He no longer plays music after midnight.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you put the spare key?
recent_60_samples.answer: I left it with the front desk attendant.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Julian tell you about the deadline change?
recent_60_samples.answer: The deadline has been pushed to next Friday afternoon.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you noticed anything strange about the dorm lounge?
recent_60_samples.answer: The vending machine no longer accepts our meal cards.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Where did you hear about the new tutoring service?
recent_60_samples.answer: The flyer that I saw was posted near the cafeteria entrance.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you find a good study spot?
recent_60_samples.answer: I sit upstairs near the big windows.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Professor Cho mention after lecture?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know if my draft was longer than the requirement.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you visit the financial aid office today?
recent_60_samples.answer: They told me when the scholarship results would arrive.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you heard back about your housing form?
recent_60_samples.answer: The office has not processed my application yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I just joined the campus radio club.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I pick up my member badge?

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did your dorm advisor explain about laundry?
recent_60_samples.answer: She mentioned that the dryers had been replaced.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you grab anything for lunch today?
recent_60_samples.answer: I picked up a sandwich at the food truck.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your interview at the bookstore go well?
recent_60_samples.answer: The manager asked whether I had retail experience before.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Is the coffee shop in the union still open late?
recent_60_samples.answer: The cafe no longer stays open past nine.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you decided about the elective for spring?
recent_60_samples.answer: Honestly, I have not committed to any section yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you spoken with Olivia today?
recent_60_samples.answer: She left her keys at the desk.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard you and Harold went out last weekend.
recent_60_samples.answer: We watched the new comedy on Saturday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I lost track of Mariana after the seminar.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where did she go after the dance class started?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did Hector skip helping you with your move?
recent_60_samples.answer: He has not returned from his family trip.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did Margot follow up with you about the volunteer schedule?
recent_60_samples.answer: She asked whether I had signed up for Saturday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I keep forgetting our classmate's full name.
recent_60_samples.answer: Emma is the classmate who took the chemistry seminar.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you skip the orientation session today?
recent_60_samples.answer: Julian needed help moving boxes into his dorm.

recent_60_samples.prompt: You should ask Matthew about the new chemistry seminar.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I sign up for that seminar?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did anyone update you about Alison's room situation?
recent_60_samples.answer: The advisor asked whether the lounge furniture had been replaced.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you hear why Naomi visited financial aid?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know whether the scholarship deadline had already passed.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm thinking of joining the campus radio club.
recent_60_samples.answer: Where do I sign up for it?

recent_60_samples.prompt: Why did you stay late at the dean's office?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wanted to know how my project was going.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I heard you are switching majors next semester.
recent_60_samples.answer: I plan to declare economics in the fall.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did the dining staff announce this morning?
recent_60_samples.answer: The hot bar will be closed until Friday.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Have you confirmed your spring registration yet?
recent_60_samples.answer: I have not finalized my course list yet.

recent_60_samples.prompt: What did Professor Singh ask you after lecture?
recent_60_samples.answer: She wondered whether my outline had a clear thesis.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did you settle into your new study spot?
recent_60_samples.answer: The booth that I picked has great lighting.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did your appointment with the writing center help much?
recent_60_samples.answer: The tutor asked whether my outline had addressed all the counterarguments.

recent_60_samples.prompt: Did the campus art studios reopen after the renovation?
recent_60_samples.answer: Our classroom that everyone uses had been repainted over the weekend.

recent_60_samples.prompt: I'm trying to grab dinner with the new students.
recent_60_samples.answer: Is the dining hall still open tonight?
